name: Pickled Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cauliflower and onions by cutting them into desired pieces.
2. In a large pot, mix together the salt, sugar, vinegar, mustard seeds, celery seeds, and hot pepper until well combined.
3. Add the chopped cauliflower and onions to the mixture, ensuring they are fully coated.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and let cool completely before transferring to sterilized jars.
7. Seal the jars tightly and allow them to cool at room temperature.
8. Turn off the heat and store the pickled cauliflower in a cool, dark place until ready to serve.
